summary: Frontend-only Playwright E2E for landing page Vender na Net. All critical flows pass: page loads, header sticky, hero CTA scrolls to #comprar, color swatches swap product image, size selector highlights (bg-black), quantity +/- updates display & price (1=R$69,90 / 2=R$89,90 / 3=R$134,85), free-shipping banner toggles correctly at >=R$100 (qty 3), payment toggle (PIX/Cartão) works, WhatsApp deeplink generated via window.open with correct number 5511942377344 and full order payload (produto, cor, tamanho, qtd, valor, cliente, endereço, pagamento), validation toast 'Por favor, informe seu nome.' shown when name/address empty (window.open not called), about-whatsapp-link href points to https://wa.me/5511942377344, all sections (benefits/testimonials/guarantee/faq/about/final-cta/footer) render, FAQ accordion items q1-q5 expand (data-state=open).

issues:
Visual text shows broken line wrapping ('O luxodo confortono seu pé.') due to
rendering without surrounding whitespace — visually OK on wide screens but textContent has no spaces; consider adding spaces or aria-label for screen readers.

critical_code_review_comments: LandingPage.jsx is ~740 lines — consider splitting into Hero, Configurator, Benefits, Testimonials, FAQ, Footer sub-components for maintainability.
calcPrice has duplicated pricing rule comment; logic is correct (qty=1: 69.90, qty=2: 89.90, qty>=3: 89.90 + (qty-2)*44.95).
All required data-testid attributes are present and stable for automation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure frontend landing page (no backend). WhatsApp number 5511942377344. To assert window.open URL in Playwright, override window.open before clicking send-whatsapp-button. Selecting sizes sequentially via clicks leaves the LAST clicked size as active (37-38 is default initial). All testids verified working.
